BASE-001.title: 固定当前 Hooks/UI/桌宠基线
BASE-001.notes: Baseline accepted on main. make check passed (Core 671, Desktop 272), Playwright passed 28/28 after aligning the four-mode contract, and macOS arm64 package:dir passed unsigned as expected.

GOV-002.title: 建立全仓格式化与零告警门禁
GOV-002.notes: Round 1 started on codex/cross-platform-release-v2. RED captured: `npm run format:check` failed with missing script, and Desktop typecheck file lists excluded `src/**/*.test.ts` plus `tests/visual/**/*.spec.ts` (`npm --prefix desktop exec tsc -- -p tsconfig.node.json --noEmit --listFilesOnly | rg 'desktop/(src/.+\\.(test|spec)\\.ts|tests/visual/.+\\.spec\\.ts)'` and `npm --prefix desktop exec vue-tsc -- --noEmit -p tsconfig.web.json --listFilesOnly | rg 'desktop/src/renderer/src/.+\\.(test|spec)\\.ts'` both exited 1). Baseline lint warnings observed: Core 1 warning, Desktop 14 warnings. GREEN on round 1: `npm --prefix desktop run typecheck:test`, `npm run lint --workspace @emperor/core`, `npm --prefix desktop run lint`, `npm run typecheck --workspace @emperor/core`, `npm --prefix desktop run typecheck`, `git diff --check`, plus Desktop test file-list evidence from `tsc --listFilesOnly` for renderer/main/preload/pet/tests/visual. Round 2: `npm run format` applied the repository-wide mechanical Prettier pass. Final GOV-002 verification after formatting: `npm run format:check`, `npm --prefix desktop run typecheck:test`, `npm run lint --workspace @emperor/core`, `npm --prefix desktop run lint`, `make check`, and `git diff --check`. Review-fix follow-up on the shared worktree kept completed/rounds unchanged: anchored root-only runtime ignores in `.prettierignore`, filtered deleted tracked paths in `scripts/run-prettier.mjs`, restored strict renderer test typecheck with real Vitest types plus `skipLibCheck` for the external `vitest`/`vite` lib conflict, removed the temporary Vitest any-shim, tightened `test-vue-shim` to `unknown`, repaired the 57 strict renderer diagnostics, restored `ModelPicker.vue` to an inline template event expression, and re-verified with `npm run format:check`, `npm --prefix desktop run typecheck:test`, `npm run lint --workspace @emperor/core`, `npm --prefix desktop run lint`, `make check`, and `git diff --check`. `make check` needed one rerun after an unrelated flaky `src/hooks/executor-v2.test.ts` timeout assertion; the immediate focused rerun and the subsequent full rerun both passed.

PORT-003.title: 用 Node 原生实现 Glob/Grep
PORT-003.notes: Round 3 completed with strict TDD. RED before production edits: `npm test --workspace @emperor/core -- src/tools/search.test.ts` exited 1 with 18 failed / 3 passed; failures proved recursive/filter/path/cancellation/symlink/limit gaps, and `$()` plus backtick injection canaries were created by the shell-backed implementation. GREEN: Node-native async opendir/lstat/realpath traversal, workspace-policy canonical symlink validation, Node RegExp streaming grep, binary/>2 MiB filtering, three output modes/context, POSIX paths, diagnostic errors, and 200-result caps; AgentLoop and Hook agent handler share `tools/search.ts`, while builtin keeps only a compatibility re-export and RunCommand's async exec. Initial focused verification passed 22/22 and Core passed 693 tests. Local security review then added a RED invariant test for canonical I/O and streaming byte enforcement, changed directory/file opens to validated real paths, and enforced the 2 MiB limit per chunk so concurrent growth cannot bypass it. Review-fix GREEN passed focused 23/23, Core 85 files / 694 tests, Core typecheck/lint, repository format check, and `git diff --check`. Packaged Electron 42.4.1 embeds Node 24.16 where `path.matchesGlob` is stable; the development host's Node 22.16 emits one experimental warning, retained as a non-release residual risk.

IPC-004.title: 建立全量类型化 Core operation registry
IPC-004.notes: Round 4 completed with strict TDD and three review passes. RED evidence covered a missing registry, unsafe Zod error exposure, malformed IPC arguments, renderer generic assertions, scheduler contract/policy drift, MCP extension-field stripping, transcript limit zero, hostile throwable traps, unknown operation channels, task transcript traversal/symlink escape, dropped attachments/requestedSkills, and untyped tools.readResult. GREEN delivers one 81-operation CoreOperationMap registry with exact Zod tuples and fixed adapters, compile-time route coverage, typed main/preload/renderer invocation, safe non-throwing IPC envelopes, restored scheduler policy, forward-compatible MCP schemas, real attachment model delivery, explicit Skill context injection, and no-follow/realpath transcript boundaries. Final independent review found Critical 0 / Important 0 / Minor 0 and Ready to merge Yes. Final make check passed Core 86 files / 711 tests and Desktop 62 files / 276 tests, plus Core/Desktop typecheck, Desktop test typecheck, zero-warning ESLint, Prettier, git diff check, and production build.

RSC-005.title: 直接读取签名 runtime defaults
RSC-005.notes: Round 5 completed from clean commit 5cf5f0dc with strict TDD. Packaged runtimeRoot is now forced to resourcesPath/runtime-defaults ahead of argv/env overrides; runtime/state overlap is rejected before writes; userData/runtime remains a separate read-only legacy source for attachment fallback and non-destructive memory/session/config migration. A deterministic schema-v1 manifest records app version, exact sorted file paths, sizes, SHA-256 digests, built-in Skills and runtime revision. electron-builder beforePack generates it and afterPack validates the final appOutDir resource tree before signing. Unknown Skills from legacy runtime/skills and runtime/.emperor/skills migrate atomically with blocked_pending_review markers and a strict, idempotent receipt; built-ins, collisions, malformed content, symlinks and corrupt receipts are skipped/quarantined without deleting source data. FileSkillsLoader fails closed on blocked markers while preserving flat .md Skills and user-over-builtin precedence. Security review found three Important and two Minor issues; follow-up tests closed legacy directory/file/cycle/config symlink traversal, flat Skill hiding, missing final-package validation, weak receipt validation and duplicate/unsorted builtInSkills. Final make check passed Core 87 files / 723 tests and Desktop 62 files / 279 tests, plus both typechecks, Desktop test typecheck, zero-warning ESLint, Prettier, git diff check and production build. macOS arm64 package:dir passed; afterPack and Core both validated the actual 70-file runtime tree with 10 current built-ins and revision 48514047dd1e86bed6677f20bdf229e480ff705168f63fce540a86aba2fd6300. Code signing was skipped only because the planned Developer ID credential is not yet available.

SKILL-006.title: 最小内置 Skill 与 Core 原生 Creator
SKILL-006.notes: Round 6 completed from clean commit 4f12b911 with strict TDD and three independent review passes. Only skill-creator remains active; nine prior built-ins moved to non-scanned/non-packaged skills-catalog, all catalog developer-machine paths now use {{skill_dir}}, and Creator's three Python helpers were removed. Core now provides YAML-backed source/status/requirements metadata, create/validate/reproducible package operations, manage_skill, canonical runtime placeholder expansion, user-over-builtin precedence, invalid/blocked fail-closed loading, and explicit flat .md compatibility. Packaging enforces canonical state containment, no-follow descriptor reads, identity-stable snapshots, symlink rejection, bounded depth/entries/files/bytes, deterministic ZIP metadata, recoverable Windows replacement, and CoreApi mutation guards. Initial review found two Critical, four Important and one Minor issue; all seven were fixed. Final review found Critical 0 / Important 0 and Ready Yes. Final make check passed Core 88 files / 742 tests and Desktop 62 files / 280 tests, plus both typechecks, Desktop test typecheck, zero-warning ESLint, Prettier, diff checks and production build. Final macOS arm64 package:dir passed; the 47-file runtime manifest contains only skill-creator (revision f464dfbe4148746cf93f4b79e5b3a9f584d845f3ec8b313155c8a83103073564), with no Python or skills-catalog resources. Signing remains intentionally deferred to REL-MAC-018 because no valid Developer ID credential is available.

ENV-FND-007.title: 建立 Environment schemas、catalog 与 store
ENV-FND-007.notes: Round 7 completed from clean commit caa85302 with strict TDD and four review passes. Core now exposes strict Zod environment tool/state/plan/job/receipt/log schemas, 20 stable Chinese error descriptors with bound recovery actions, fixed internal-error redaction, and a packaged immutable 12-tool ToolCatalog that validates before AgentLoop state writes. Catalog validation fails closed on schema drift, unsupported targets, duplicate/cyclic/platform-incompatible dependencies, uncovered targets, unsafe/public-network inputs, missing digest/publisher, nonconcrete or unsatisfied versions, and any probe/install command outside exact static allowlists. Official metadata locked Git 2.55.0, ripgrep 15.1.0, Volta 2.0.2, Node 24.18.0, npm 12.0.1, uv 0.11.28, Python 3.12.13, Go 1.26.5, Rust/Cargo 1.97.0, rustup 1.29.0 and MSVC 17.14.37411.7; golden revision is dc95b1f423e1b8ccde50c66c06fa172f9226b95be7f15e10799ac2a4fefc7ffe. EnvironmentStore provides strict atomic JSON, Windows backup recovery, same-path read/write serialization, corruption isolation, symlinked-directory rejection, paged JSONL and conservative HOME/user/header/cookie/token/CLI credential redaction. Final independent review found Critical 0 / Important 0 and Ready Yes. Final make check passed Core 92 files / 765 tests and Desktop 62 files / 280 tests, plus both typechecks, Desktop test typecheck, zero-warning ESLint, Prettier, diff checks and migration parity; final Electron production build passed. Probe execution remains intentionally deferred to ENV-PROBE-008.
